sql_fixture.redacted_sql: SELECT id FROM claims WHERE tenant_id = :current_tenant_id   AND project_id = :target_project_id   AND id = :target_claim_id

assertions.name: claim_repository_rejects_cross_project_same_tenant
assertions.expected: BL-0029c integration: ClaimRepository project-scoped methods enforce (tenant_id, project_id) composite filter; SELECT against a different project_id within the same tenant returns None.

assertions.name: composite_fk_trace
assertions.expected: Composite (tenant_id, project_id, id) FK enforces project boundary even within the same tenant; aligns with BL-0029c cross-project negative invariant.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 batch 5 BL-0029c cross-project (same-tenant) coverage. Codex F-PR27-R3-004 P1 adopt: complements the cross-tenant fixtures with the same-tenant cross-project scenario for full BL-0029c coverage. No production row IDs or personal data.
